SAMA and NCA regulatory oversight creates dual regulatory reporting obligations — any gap creates director liability
Saudi Aramco Digital competitive threat creates going concern disclosure obligation for directors in investor reporting
loss_history: No prior D&O claims; one NCA cybersecurity questionnaire response submitted in 2023
special_conditions: PDPL breach notification costs sublimit SAR 2M; NCA regulatory proceedings sublimit SAR 3M; cybersecurity incident response costs covered up to SAR 500K; identity data breach excluded from D&O — refer to cyber liability policy

risk_factors: 8 showrooms with large inventory of upholstered furniture — fire load is exceptionally high
Sharjah and Dubai mall locations — mall common area fire spreads rapidly to tenant stock
AED 14M inventory at any given time — theft and shoplifting risk is material for high-value furniture pieces
E-commerce warehouse in Jebel Ali with automated picking — equipment failure creates fulfillment disruption
loss_history: One showroom fire AED 580K in 2021 — electrical fault in display lighting; settled. Two theft claims AED 120K
special_conditions: Showroom fire deductible AED 15K per event; theft sublimit AED 500K per showroom; e-commerce warehouse business interruption maximum 30 days; upholstered furniture fire sublimit AED 20M per location

risk_factors: CBK provisional e-payment license could be withdrawn — directors face disclosure obligations to investors and merchants
1,400 merchant relationships create contractual performance obligations on directors
BNPL product launch without full CBK approval creates regulatory breach risk for directors
Series A investors have board representation — investor-director fiduciary duty is heightened
loss_history: No prior D&O claims
special_conditions: CBK license revocation defense costs sublimit KWD 400K; BNPL regulatory breach excluded unless CBK approval obtained; investor claims excluded

risk_factors: 280 school buses with 420,000 student journey-days annually — director duty of care for student transport safety
MOE safety certification annual renewal — any certification lapse triggers contract termination risk
Founder exit and ownership transfer — new directors inherit undisclosed maintenance and safety compliance liabilities
28% driver attrition creates periods of unlicensed driver substitution risk — regulatory breach exposure
loss_history: No prior D&O claims; one MOE safety inspection finding in 2022 — resolved with bus retirement
special_conditions: Student transport regulatory proceedings sublimit KWD 500K; prior acts coverage from 2021; driver licensing compliance warranty required

risk_factors: NHIF reimbursement rate risk — any tariff revision creates going concern disclosure obligation for directors
Al-Rajhi family office minority shareholder with board representation — investor-director fiduciary risk
COO hire outstanding — management gap creates operational governance risk with director liability implications
4 senior consultant physician non-compete structures are inadequate — departure risk creates going concern disclosure risk
loss_history: No prior D&O claims
special_conditions: Minority shareholder derivative action sublimit SAR 2M; NHIF regulatory proceedings sublimit SAR 1.5M; management gap governance risk noted as material underwriting consideration

risk_factors: Kuwait Data Protection Law compliance obligations on directors for 1.2M patient records processed annually
MOH digital integration pre-approval creates regulatory dependency — any MOH policy change affects business viability
KSA expansion without existing legal entity — directors may be personally liable for pre-incorporation contracts
3 data engineers hold all platform IP — undisclosed departure creates going concern disclosure obligation for directors
loss_history: No prior D&O claims
special_conditions: Patient data breach notification costs sublimit KWD 300K; KSA pre-incorporation liability excluded; MOH regulatory proceedings sublimit KWD 400K
